reason: Low-risk governance proposal: adds publish gate freshness validation and lifecycle management for board artifacts. No protected path changes, no auth/trust boundary impact. All affected paths are governance docs, runbooks, config metadata, and monitoring metrics. Risk level self-assessed as low. Addresses real operational issue (stale artifacts published). Apply with assisted mode.
notes: Evidence from 2026-03-28 shows stale agenda-seed-latest.md with mismatched board_cycle_slot_id.
No changes to auth, routing, trust boundary, or approval mechanisms.
Aligns with Board governance hardening direction from decision-20260326103500-board-agenda-assembly.
